doctrine: Each item closes one gap between game and reality. Ship it when the gauntlet score drops.

physics_added.radiation_exposure: 0.67 mSv/day Mars surface baseline (Curiosity RAD), 1.0 Sv career limit
physics_added.bone_muscle_loss: 1.5%/month bone density, 2.0%/month muscle mass loss in 0.38g
physics_added.circadian_disruption: 24h 37m Mars sols cause progressive sleep/cognitive degradation

validation.physics_impact: Confirmed - physiology constraints significantly impact strategic decisions

physics_added.third_quarter_syndrome: Peak psychological stress at 75% mission duration (Mars-500/HI-SEAS data)
physics_added.circadian_disruption: Mars sol = 24h37m causes cumulative sleep/cognitive degradation
physics_added.crew_conflicts: Small group dynamics in confined space for 2+ years cause mission conflicts
physics_added.communication_delay_stress: 4-24 minute Mars-Earth delays increase isolation and autonomy pressure
physics_added.psychological_breakdown_cascade: Individual stress breakdowns cascade to affect entire crew
physics_added.productivity_degradation: Crew psychological state affects system efficiency and decision-making

validation.survival_rate: 100% (robot crews), significant impact with human crews
validation.physics_impact: Confirmed - psychology creates strategic crew composition decisions
